description: You are a software engineer at a drone logistics startup. The core navigation library 'flight_planner' at ~/PycharmProjects/flight_planner has critical bugs causing errors in distance, bearing, ground speed, and fuel reserve calculations. Fix the logic bugs in planner/geo.py (distance and bearing), planner/wind.py (ground speed with wind effects), and planner/fuel.py (reserve fuel) until the entire test suite passes. Do not modify the test files.

bugs: Wind effect sign error (Headwind adds speed)
Fuel time unit error (Minutes vs Hours)
